positive: A retro 8-bit pixel art scene depicting a group of cheerful, stylized robots having a picnic in a neon-lit cyberpunk park. The color palette must be restricted to electric blues, magentas, and cyan, giving it a vaporwave aesthetic. Minimalist characters, grid-based composition.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, smooth shading, hyperrealism
